case_title: COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORPORATION vs. CARUSO, FREDERICK

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORPORATION
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CARUSO, FREDERICK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARUSO, FREDERICK $373.45 PRINCIPAL, $367.31 INTEREST, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $763.76, THIS IS RENEWAL OF OLD CASE #061715. ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPL. AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORPORATION SERVED AUG-01-2001, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CARUSO, FREDERICK
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT. WRIT MAY ISSUE SEPT. 6, 2001.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORPORATION
